elements.text:
You have a lot of housework that you have to do tonight, and you also have a big project that's due tomorrow. Both have to get done, and you think about how you'll handle it all. 

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: It feels overwhelming having so much to do, but I can take it one thing at a time.
I'm able to balance a lot.
I don't know how I'm going to fit all of this in tonight, but I can make a plan.
I'm not going to be able to do all of this tonight.
I think about how great it is to be busy.
